works: Scoped local CSV smokes cover Python query-builder paths, SQL local-source smokes, certified import/stage runs, and feature-gated Vortex ingest. Current certified cold-route evidence distinguishes text-adapter RecordBatch import and Vortex digest attribution when present.
blocked: Not production CSV ETL, not broad SQL/DataFrame parity, and not a performance claim.

works: Flat local JSONL/NDJSON fixture smokes are admitted through scoped local-source and ingest paths. Current certified cold-route evidence distinguishes text-adapter RecordBatch import when present.
blocked: Nested JSON, JSONPath, broad schema evolution, and production JSON processing remain outside the claim.

works: Flat local JSON source smokes are visible through Python/local-source evidence paths.
blocked: Nested objects, arrays, JSONPath, and broad document runtime support remain blocked or report-only.

works: A local SQLite file can be table-scanned by name into workspace-safe JSONL and roundtripped into a local SQLite artifact with replay evidence.
blocked: No arbitrary SQL, query pushdown, SQLite Vortex ingest, BLOB export, network database, warehouse, credentials, production connector, or performance claim is made.

capability: Deterministic UDF fixture and extension metadata
works: The built-in nullable-int64 scalar fixture runs deterministically, and extension manifests are inspectable without loading extension code.
blocked: Arbitrary Python/WASM/Rust/plugin/SQL/external-service UDFs, dynamic loading, API/LLM/embedding/vector effects, credentials, and network effects remain blocked.

works: Scoped Parquet fixture paths are documented where feature gates and flat scalar constraints are satisfied.
blocked: Default builds may block Parquet writes; nested/complex types and production Parquet parity require later runtime slices.

works: Feature-gated local flat scalar Arrow IPC file sources can run through sql-local-source-smoke and Python read_arrow_ipc(...) with SourceState-style evidence when built with --features universal-format-io.
blocked: Default binaries block Arrow IPC deterministically. Broad Arrow IPC type/nesting coverage, zero-copy Arrow execution, in-memory Arrow table fallback, Arrow IPC output, object-store/table/runtime claims, and production support remain blocked.

works: Feature-gated local flat scalar Avro file sources and local Avro sinks/fanout can run through sql-local-source-smoke and Python read_avro(...) or write_avro(...) with SourceState, output certificate, and scoped binary sink preservation evidence when built with --features universal-format-io.
blocked: Default binaries block Avro deterministically. Broad Avro schema evolution, logical-type completeness beyond admitted flat scalar rows, typed decimal sink preservation, Vortex-native output equivalence, object-store/table/runtime claims, and production support remain blocked.

works: Feature-gated local flat scalar ORC file sources and local ORC sinks/fanout can run through sql-local-source-smoke and Python read_orc(...) or write_orc(...) with SourceState, output certificate, and scoped binary sink preservation evidence when built with --features universal-format-io.
blocked: Default binaries block ORC deterministically. Broad ORC stripe/statistics runtime, logical-type completeness beyond admitted flat scalar rows, typed decimal sink preservation, Vortex-native output equivalence, object-store/table/runtime claims, and production support remain blocked.

works: Prepared/native Vortex benchmark and source-backed scan lanes are visible with no-fallback fields.
blocked: Broad encoded-native operator coverage and production Vortex writer support remain gated.

works: Python helpers can generate local reference rows, ranges, calendars, VALUES, and literal SELECT outputs.
blocked: This is not a broad SQL generator, Foundry production output, or object-store sink claim.

works: The Python wrapper exposes status/capability checks, scoped local CSV/JSON plus feature-gated Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC workflows, and local compatibility sink fanout through the local CLI.
blocked: It is not yet a native in-process SparkSession-equivalent runtime for all SQL/DataFrame operations.

works: Scoped local CSV/JSON plus feature-gated Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC/Vortex SQL/query-builder smokes exist for projection/filter/limit, aggregates, top-N, joins, local sink fanout, and scoped binary sink preservation, including non-null Vortex binary output.
blocked: Broad SQL/DataFrame runtime parity, catalogs, broad subqueries, generalized joins, Vortex SQL sources, nullable/all-null Vortex binary rows and other NULL-bearing Vortex output batches, broad structured-format semantics, and production semantics remain blocked.

works: An explicit public no-credential fixture profile parses S3/GCS/ADLS URIs and reads caller-supplied local fixture bytes with SourceState and Native I/O evidence.
blocked: Live provider network reads, credential resolution, authenticated reads, cache writes, cloud writes, table commits, distributed runtime, and production object-store claims remain blocked.

works: The profile admits a supported S3/GCS/ADLS URI plus an explicit local fixture path for byte-range or full-file read smoke evidence without credentials or network effects.
blocked: No live public bucket fetch, signed URL support, authenticated provider read, cache write, cloud write, table/lakehouse commit, distributed runtime, production, or performance claim is made.

works: An explicit local-emulator profile can read a local fixture object as full-file or byte-range smoke and emit SourceState plus Native I/O evidence.
blocked: Real S3/GCS/ADLS providers, credentials, network probes, cloud writes, table commits, distributed runtime, and production object-store claims remain blocked.

works: An explicit local-emulator profile can stage a local source file into a local object path, commit a sidecar manifest, and optionally roll back the object plus manifest for cleanup proof.
blocked: Real S3/GCS/ADLS providers, credentials, network probes, provider listing, cloud writes, table commits, catalogs, distributed runtime, and production object-store claims remain blocked.

works: A local-manifest fixture can rehearse an append-only table metadata commit by writing a staged committed manifest, sidecar commit record, idempotency evidence, and optional rollback cleanup proof.
blocked: Iceberg/Delta/Hudi production runtime, catalog commits, object-store table commits, merge/update/delete, distributed runtime, and production lakehouse claims remain blocked.

works: Table/lakehouse metadata, delete/tombstone, CDC overlay, and local append commit rehearsal smokes are visible as fixture-scoped evidence.
blocked: No Iceberg/Delta/Hudi production runtime, merge/update/delete, catalog commit, object-store table commit, rollback, or lakehouse production support is claimed.

works: Local/dev-stack proof docs and no-dataset/generated-output boundaries are documented.
blocked: No Foundry production runtime, package publication, or Spark-backed ShardLoom execution claim.

works: Committed static benchmark artifacts expose lanes, missing reasons, coverage, claim boundaries, and stage-attribution fields for source-state layout, Vortex array build, write, digest, scan, result sink, and evidence rendering.
blocked: Benchmark evidence is not a leaderboard, public speed claim, or Spark-replacement claim. The next promoted artifact must be refreshed before updated performance interpretation.

works: Release dry-run and provenance docs exist for local validation.
blocked: No package publication or public install-channel claim is made.
